examples: The magnetoresistance curves and microstructures of some samples are measured.
No magnetoresistance effect was observed in the temperature range of measurement.
Changing of material resistance with applied magnetic field intensity is called Giant magnetoresistance (GMR).
They won the 2007 Nobel prize in physics for uncovering this so-called giant magnetoresistance effect.
Over the past 30 years several new forms of magnetoresistance have been found.
